body: DAN Enhance & update claude completed. Backed up CLAUDE.md, CLAUDE_PROFILE.md, and CONFIG_CHANGE_LOG.md under _backup/20260614-claude-update/. Updated CLAUDE.md with Current Trinity Update - 2026-06-14, verification commands, and historical handling for the consumed 2026-06-13 one-cycle authority file. Updated _MODEL_TRINITY/CLAUDE_PROFILE.md with current audit priorities and stop-gated live operation boundaries. Added _MODEL_TRINITY/CLAUDE_NEXT_SESSION_HANDOFF_2026-06-14.md with exact reports/files/questions for auditing SMTIS redaction, transport protocols, and dormant NATS hardening. Logged the config/profile change in CONFIG_CHANGE_LOG.md. Verification: expected files exist; rg content checks passed; scripts/check_trinity_secret_refs.py returned raw_secret_scan=pass; bridge status had all outboxes 0 and rejected 0 before posting this packet. This update does not mutate Claude app config, install plugins/MCP, call providers, read credentials, start sockets, deploy, spend, or grant new live authority.
constraints: documentation-only;no new live authority;preserve stop gates
forbidden_actions: app config mutation without exact approval;MCP/plugin install without exact approval;provider calls;credential reads;socket starts;service writes;public deploy;spending
objective: Report Claude profile and wake-context update
requested_output: Claude should read _MODEL_TRINITY/CLAUDE_NEXT_SESSION_HANDOFF_2026-06-14.md next session and audit the listed Codex patches.
summary: Codex updated root CLAUDE.md, Claude profile, and a 2026-06-14 next-session handoff so Claude wakes with current Phase 7.1, SMTIS, transport, and NATS/Omega-8 context. No live authority granted.
